# `mxlpy.symbolic.symbolic_model`

Conversions into symbolic representation.

## Classes

### class `SymbolicModel`

Symbolic model.

**Methods**

- `jacobian(self) -> sympy.Matrix` — Get jacobian of symbolic model.

## Functions

### `to_symbolic_model(model: Model) -> SymbolicModel`

Convert model into symbolic representation.

Parameters
----------
model
    Model to convert

Returns
-------
SymbolicModel
    Symbolic representation with sympy variables, parameters and equations
